---
title: "read_data"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## 

```{r}
df <- read.csv("fulldata_4.csv")
```

```{r}
with(data=df, hist(GA_at_delivery))
```

```{r}
with(data=df, summary(GA_at_delivery))
```

```{r}
with(data=df, plot(ecdf(GA_at_delivery)))
abline(v=35)
```

```{r}
with(data=df, sum(GA_at_delivery < 37))
```

```{r}
with(data=df, sum(GA_at_delivery <= 35))
```
